articles.title: Coolidge Corner Theatre workers vote to authorize strike as contract negotiations stall
articles.description:
The vote doesn't mean the workers will immediately strike; spokesperson Ginny Hamlin said "we do want to be heard a little more first."

The post Coolidge Corner Theatre workers vote to authorize strike as contract negotiations stall appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Coolidge Corner Theatre workers voted to authorize a strike amid stalled contract negotiations.
Spokesperson Ginny Hamlin stated workers want to be heard before deciding to strike.
Potential strike could disrupt operations at the popular Brookline cinema for local residents.

articles.title: Alex Cora believes this Red Sox player will slug 30 home runs this season
articles.description:
"'Well, Abreu is going to hit 30 homers this year.’ Like this is a given."

The post Alex Cora believes this Red Sox player will slug 30 home runs this season appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Alex Cora predicts Wilyer Abreu will hit 30 home runs this season.
Abreu's performance could boost Red Sox's offensive strength in 2023.
Increased home runs may enhance fan engagement and attendance at Fenway Park.

articles.title: New NFL mock draft has Patriots taking ‘fascinating’ offensive tackle with pick No. 31
articles.description:
"I could see the Patriots wanting to find someone to groom as Morgan Moses' replacement."

summary: Patriots may draft an offensive tackle with pick No. 31 in the upcoming NFL draft.

This decision could significantly impact the team's offensive line strategy for Boston fans.

articles.title: Lukas Reichel has goal and assist in Boston debut to help Bruins top Jets 6-1
articles.description:
Boston was coming off overtime losses at New Jersey on Monday night and Montreal on Tuesday night.

The post Lukas Reichel has goal and assist in Boston debut to help Bruins top Jets 6-1 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Lukas Reichel scored one goal and provided one assist in his Bruins debut.
Bruins defeated the Jets 6-1, improving their season record significantly.
This victory follows two overtime losses, boosting morale for Boston fans.
